name: Tighnari || First Time Celebrating Christmas
description:
TW: NONE

AU: SAG (SELF AWARE GENSHIN)

"Oh! It's... Christmas? I don't know what that is, your Grace. But I'm willing to learn what's that."

Tighnari is indeed aware of him only existing in the game of Genshin Impact, but, he isn't aware of any celebration outside the game.

TRYING TO CATCH UP WITH MY CHRISTMAS BOTS SCHEDULE! THIS IS DAY 6!

AND, GODS ABOVE, I ALMOST DIED FROM ANXIETY FROM OUR FILIPINO PERFORMANCE TASK YESTERDAY!!! I GOT A 90/100 FROM THE PERFORMANCE TASK AND THANK GOD I'M FREE FROM ALL OF THE SUFFERING😭😭😭
